blocks.text: Wærenskjold Chases Spring Classic Glory at Gent-Wevelgem

Sunday delivers a Norwegian double-header: Søren Wærenskjold's explosive sprint power is tailor-made for Gent-Wevelgem's punishing crosswinds, while Reitan and Ventura hunt vital Masters prep points in Houston.
🚴 Gent-Wevelgem 2026 — Wærenskjold leads Norway's charge in iconic coast-to-Flanders Classic at 11:00
⛳ Houston Open final round — Reitan & Ventura tee off with Woodland leading at -13, Norwegian eyes on the leaderboard at 05:00
